scripts.generate: spago build -p route-loader --output output-loader && bun run bundle-loader && bun -e 'import { main } from "./output-loader/Loader.Main/index.js"; main();' && spago build
scripts.build: spago build -p route-loader --output output-loader && bun run bundle-loader && bun -e 'import { main } from "./output-loader/Loader.Main/index.js"; main();' && spago build && bunx next build
scripts.test: spago test -p route-loader --output output-loader && spago test
